items.title: HiPP recalls jarred baby food in Austria over contamination fears
items.dek: Police are investigating whether jars sold in Spar shops were criminally interfered with.
items.body: Police are investigating whether jars sold in Spar shops were criminally interfered with.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Pope says 'tyrants' speech was not aimed at Trump
items.dek: The pontiff says his remarks have been misinterpreted after a spat with the US president.
items.body: The pontiff says his remarks have been misinterpreted after a spat with the US president.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: At least two dead as gunman opens fire and takes hostages in Kyiv
items.dek: The country's interior minister says the shooter has been killed after a shoot-out with police.
items.body: The country's interior minister says the shooter has been killed after a shoot-out with police.
items.author: IriLine Desk
